subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! Your dwelling is a sanctuary for the teaching of the loved ones and a nest for the birds of heaven; nay, rather [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان لانه شما کاشانه تبلیغ احباست و آشیانه مرغان آسمانیست بلکه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
